debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

proof:
by
  funext A
  ext x
  simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
  constructor
  · intro hx
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨z, hz, hzy⟩ := hy
    have : g (f z) = z := by
      have := congrFun h z
      exact this
    rw [← hxy, ← hzy, this]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    use f x
    constructor
    · use x
    · have : g (f x) = x := congrFun h x
      exact this
failed_attempts:
by
  funext A
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    obtain ⟨B, hB, hxB⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hyB⟩ := hxB
    obtain ⟨z, hz, hzy⟩ := hy
    have : g (f z) = z := congrFun h z
    rw [← hzy] at hyB
    rw [← this, ← hyB]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    use image f A
    constructor
    · rfl
    · use f x
      constructor
      · use x
      · exact congrFun h x

by
  funext A
  ext x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hgx⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨z, hz, hfy⟩ := hy
    rw [← hgx, ← hfy]
    have : (g ∘ f) z = z := by rw [h]; rfl
    rw [this]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    use f x
    constructor
    · use x
    · have : (g ∘ f) x = x := by rw [h]; rfl
      exact this
